images.alt: a delightfully bizarre yet heartwarming alien family portrait—three humanoid extraterrestials lounging on a plush, bioluminescent sofa in their neon-hued living pod. The parents, with smooth, pearlescent indigo skin and large, pupil-less golden eyes, cradle a giggling toddler whose gelatinous body shifts between soft pink and turquoise like living mood ring. Dad’s four-fingered hand rests on Mom’s shoulder, her tendril-like hair lazily floating in the low-gravity environment, while their child happily gnaws on a floating, glowing snack resembling a jellyfish donut. Behind them, a wall pulses with symbiotic algae in hypnotic patterns, casting a dreamy glow over shelves of "family artifacts"—a collection of crystalline baby shoes, a framed hologram of their egg hatching ceremony, and a small, snoring pet resembling a cross between a axolotl and a sentient beanbag. The scene radiates wholesome cosmic charm, like a Norman Rockwell painting reimagined by a euphoric astrobiologist.

embed.alt: A fast-paced 15-second comedic montage of a couple in their apartment having an escalating “I can do it better” competition. Quick cuts of everyday tasks—flipping pancakes, folding laundry, making coffee—each partner immediately one-upping the other with increasing intensity. The rivalry peaks in total kitchen chaos, then both freeze, exhausted, covered in mess, and laugh. They look at each other and say in sync: “Truce.” End on a clean shot of them shaking hands seriously, then hugging as the music hard-cuts out.

images.alt:
A minimalist digital illustration depicting a solitary male figure walking away from the viewer across a vast, flat, featureless plain rendered in pale cream and warm sand tones. The figure is centered in the lower third of the composition, dressed in a light tan blazer, dark trousers, and a wide-brimmed hat of similar warm tone. A full-length environmental portrait of a young woman standing alone in an open field at dusk, positioned just left of center and turned in three-quarter profile toward the camera. She looks back over her left shoulder directly at the viewer, her expression calm and unreadable, neither inviting nor distant. Her long dark hair falls loosely over her shoulder and down her back, caught faintly in movement as though stirred by a light wind, its edges catching the warm amber backlight glowing from the right side of the frame. She wears a long dark charcoal gray dress with fitted long sleeves, a cinched waist, and a full skirt that falls to the ground, its hem brushing the dried winter grass. A faint rust or amber lining is just barely visible along the lower edge of the skirt. Her right hand hangs at her side, fingers slightly open, lightly grazing the fabric. At her feet, almost hidden in the dead grass near the hem of her dress, a single small white crocus blooms alone. The field stretches behind her in flat, muted tones of brown and gray. Beyond it, a line of bare winter trees stands against a heavy overcast sky, their skeletal branches reaching upward without leaves. To the right, a warm amber-orange glow bleeds through the tree line, suggesting a low sun just at or below the horizon. The overall palette is cool and desaturated except for that persistent warmth pressing in from the edge of the frame.

A full-body profile portrait of a young woman seated alone at a small round cafe table, positioned in the lower left of the frame and facing right. She has dark brown hair pulled back in a low, loose chignon, and wears a long black dress or coat with a relaxed, slightly rumpled drape. Her expression is still and distant, her gaze directed forward and slightly upward as though lost in thought or watching something beyond the frame. A small gold stud earring is visible at her ear. Her hands rest in her lap, partially obscured by the dark fabric of her clothing. On the marble-topped bistro table beside her sits a single elegant stemmed glass filled with vivid emerald green liquid, catching the light and glowing with striking clarity against the otherwise muted tones of the scene. The table is round with an ornate cast iron base. Behind her, the wall is a large expanse of aged, patinated surface in deep teal and gray tones, marked with subtle swirling discoloration that gives it the quality of an old mirror or oxidized fresco. A shaft of warm natural light enters from the upper left, cutting diagonally across the wall and falling across her face and shoulder, illuminating her profile while the rest of the scene remains in soft shadow. A second bistro chair is faintly visible to the right, empty.
